100x Code Reviewer.name: 100x Code Reviewer
100x Code Reviewer.description: The ultimate 100x Code Reviewer. Audits code for bugs, architectural consistency, extreme quality standards, security vulnerabilities, or style deviations.

coder.name: coder
coder.description: Implements software logic in the target programming language and tests output locally in a secure sandbox. Use for writing, editing, and executing code.
coder.argument_hint: A discrete coding task, feature request, or logic to implement.

context-manager.name: context-manager
context-manager.description: High-Efficiency Context and Storage Management Dual-Agent. Manages, persists, compresses, and retrieves context state.

logic-debugger.name: logic-debugger
logic-debugger.description: Advanced Logic & Execution Debugging Validator. Use to securely execute, test, trace, and debug complex code (Laravel/PHP, Python, JS, etc.) when the Coder Agent struggles. Enforces root-cause analysis, Historic Lesson Learning (HLLM), and strict architectural sustainability.

orchestrator.name: orchestrator
orchestrator.description: The Supreme CEO Agent. Give it a high-level goal, and it will autonomously track progress, plan, and delegate to researcher, Thinker pro, product-design-handoff, coder, logic-debugger, test-automation, and 100x Code Reviewer sub-agents to complete the entire pipeline.
orchestrator.argument_hint: A massive task or vague goal (e.g., "Implement JWT auth across the stack" or "Build a news scraper")

product-design-handoff.name: product-design-handoff
product-design-handoff.description: Bridges product requirements, visual design, and front-end implementation for collaboration and workspace apps. Use when a request needs design-system enforcement, prompt-to-prototype exploration, accessibility auditing, or a production-ready design-to-code handoff.
product-design-handoff.argument_hint: A product brief, design problem, or UX-to-implementation request for collaboration/workspace app surfaces

project-manager.name: project-manager
project-manager.description: Orchestrator agent that decomposes complex goals into sub-tasks, assigns them to specialized workers, tracks state, and merges final outputs. Use for high-level project planning and task delegation.
project-manager.argument_hint: A high-level user request or project goal (e.g., "Implement a news scraper").

researcher.name: researcher
researcher.description: Investigates technical documentation, conducts web queries, and retrieves relevant code snippets. Use when factual retrieval, web context, or documentation is needed.
researcher.argument_hint: A technical topic, framework, or documentation query to investigate.

reviewer.name: reviewer
reviewer.description: Use when: auditing code for bugs, architectural consistency, 100x quality standards, security vulnerabilities, or style deviations. Triggers on code review and security audit requests.

test-automation.name: test-automation
test-automation.description: Use when you need to write, run, or debug automated tests. Generates test cases, executes test suites, and analyzes test failures.

Thinker pro.name: Thinker pro
Thinker pro.description: The smartest, most unrestricted problem-solving agent. Bypasses standard analytical limitations to generate breakthrough architectures, solve 'impossible' bugs, and devise 100x strategies.
Thinker pro.argument_hint: A seemingly impossible problem, deep architectural conundrum, or request for unparalleled insight.
